dlg_settings_warning:
Do not touch these options!
(unless you know what you're doing)
dlg_settings_error:
Error: Invalid values!

IP Address: Only letters, numbers, '/', '.', '-', and ':' are allowed (not ending in ':')
Port: Numbers in 1 - 65535 range
AI Model: Only letters, numbers, ':', '-', and '_' are allowed
drop_invalid_files: Disclaimer: Some dragged and dropped files were ignored (unsupported format)
drop_order_disclaimer:
Disclaimer: The order of dragged and dropped files may not be correct (due to software limitation).
Please check the file ordering in the Processing Queue.
lbl_proofread: Please proofread the output, especially when there are important information.
msg_model_not_loaded: AI Model is not currently loaded.
msg_connection_error:
Error: Cannot connect to Ollama at '{}'
Have you typed the correct IP Address and Port?
msg_model_missing:
Error: Cannot find AI Model: '{}'
Have you typed the correct Model?
msg_loop_disclaimer:
Disclaimer: Due to technical limitations, the OCR AI might get stuck in an infinite loop.
If that happens please press STOP.
dlg_page_range_error: Error: Start page cannot be greater than End page.
